title: Restock
description: Refills active stacks from other stacks in your inventory
body:
ever been building and the stack you're using runs out? with this mod your stacks that are decreasing will be refilled by other stacks of the same item in your inventory meaning you can build for longer before opening your inventory. you will also be warned when you're on the last stack of a kind of item

[video](https://youtu.be/IvcSWdeqiX4)
